message:
chore(audit): record batch 432 (recent commits + new snapshot code)

Verified recent agent fixes: Take::advance remaining check (SOUND),
ReadBuf::advance overflow prevention (SOUND), fault channel mutual
exclusivity (SOUND), QUIC round-robin BTreeMap range (SOUND).

Audited new messaging snapshot code: RecoverableStreamSnapshot,
stream capture/restore lifecycle, redelivery oracle idempotent
tracking — all SOUND (776 new lines, zero bugs).

Grand total: 39 bugs fixed, 265+ files audited, ~320K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
